items.name: Low-Grade Qi Pill
items.description: A common cultivator's restorative. Tastes faintly of grass.

items.name: Minor Healing Pill
items.description: Closes wounds the body has not yet given up on.

items.name: Foundation Pill
items.description: Steadies the qi during a breakthrough. The taste is bitter; the hands stop shaking.

items.name: Cleansing Pill
items.description: Calms turbulent qi. Recommended after reading any scripture with too much red ink.

items.name: Insight Dew
items.description: A drop on the tongue. The world rearranges itself, briefly, behind the eyes.

items.name: Spirit Gathering Pill
items.description: A sect-pavilion staple. The air around the pill smells of the elder's library.

items.name: Manual: Common Qi Circulation
items.description: The first text. Ten thousand cultivators have copied it; ten thousand more will.

items.name: Manual: Iron Mountain Body Seal
items.description: Bound in coarse cloth. The diagrams show a man becoming a hill.

items.name: Manual: Severing Edge Swordform (Fragment)
items.description: Half the pages are missing. The swordsman in the diagram has no head.

items.name: Manual: Still Water Heart Sutra
items.description: Plain rice paper. The brushwork is patient, almost lazy.

items.name: Manual: Wind-Walking Steps (Partial)
items.description: Three of four chapters. The fourth was, the cover insists, eaten by a goat.

items.name: Manual: Blood Ember Sigil (Fragment)
items.description: A single page, scorched at the edges. Reading it makes the teeth ache.

items.name: Outer Sect Iron Sword
items.description: A practice blade. Heavy. Honest. The hilt fits like a shovel.

items.name: Inner Disciple Robe
items.description: Pale blue, sect-stitched. Earns a half-bow at the gate.

items.name: Warding Talisman
items.description: A strip of yellow paper, ink wet to the touch. Burns to a clean black.

items.name: Spirit Gathering Bracelet
items.description: Small jade beads. They warm against the wrist when qi gathers near.

items.name: Paper Qi Block Talisman
items.description: Single-use. Burns to a flash that smells of lemon and gunpowder.

items.name: Spiritual Stone
items.description: The cultivator's coin. Gathers qi the way a coin gathers grease.

items.name: Silver Pouch
items.description: Mortal coin. Spends well at any market that has not yet learned of qi.

items.name: Sect Token
items.description: Engraved with your name and the sect's. Opens a gate. Closes a debt.
